About Me Contact Me Surgeries Visit Parliament Newsletter ALAN'S WORK Surgeries Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here ​ In addition, I do not accept enquiries from constituents via social media platforms, all cases should be sent to be through email, telephone, post, or one of the forms on this site. I hold regular in person and online surgeries where we can discuss issues where you'd like my help. These usually take place on Thursday's and Friday's when I am back in Ayrshire, but appointments are available at other times if needed. Email me to book your appointment My team of caseworkers are happy to help you with any personal casework or enquiries. Due to strict parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make representations for those who live in Central Ayrshire. You can check who your local MP is by clicking below and entering your postcode. Who is my MP? Benefits B743 Local Government & Public Services Immigration & Visas Employment & Pensions Housing More support Promoted by Annabel Ainsworth on behalf of Alan Gemmell MP, both at Suite 5, Sovereign House, Irvine, KA12 8RL Delivering for our towns and villages ​ Privacy Policy © 2026 Alan Gemmell Home How can I help?
